calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with (administrator) Nora Carrasco.

The Court stated that there are a couple of issues, that there is now an allegation of giving the FTB notice but not a date. Ms. Rasch stated that the date was December 15, 2015 and that this information was given to the examiner. The Court stated that there is a question regarding the issue of taxes in light of the way the transfer of real property was handled. Ms. Rasch stated that they consulted a professional, that they were told they did not need to go back and do new taxes, that Ms. Carrasco was unrepresented at the time, that there were irregularities in the information received from the bank, that Ms. Carrasco had followed what the bank told her to do and that she has tried to go back and make things right. The Court stated that the other issue is all of the language requested in the order and that it looks to be remedies for future issues. Ms. Rasch stated that the language was required by the state. The Court stated that they cannot dictate to the Court. Ms. Rasch stated that it is fine for the Court to strike it and that she put it in the order because they requested it. The Court stated that it will grant the final distribution, that it is not approving the actions of the administrator and that it will adjust the language accordingly. The Court granted the petition for accounting and final distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch, for and with Petitioner Nora Carrasco

Nancy Rasch stated that she was now the attorney for the Petitioner, Nora Carrasco, and would be filing a substitution of counsel today. She stated that she also would be filing a supplemental declaration which addressed the concerns raised in the examiner's notes, and she provided the Court with a revised order.
The Court stated that upon receipt of the supplemental declaration, the Court would take the matter under submission.
Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Continued To Dec-01-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that we are here for Ms. Carrasco's Pro Per petition, that at the last hearing she was told to obtain an attorney, that she has been in contact with the probate examiner who has tried to explain to her that a probate attorney will perform the work which will be paid for later, that the Court understood that Ms. Carrasco understood that she needed to be present today, that this hearing will be continued and if Ms. Carrasco is not present or is not represented at that time the petition will go off calendar. The Petition for letters of administration was continued to December 1, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Continued To Nov-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nora Carrasco in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that Ms. Carrasco is here to proceed in Propria Persona and asked what is happening with the real property. Ms. Carrasco reported that the units are occupied and that she is not living there. The Court stated that she listed a fair market value (FMV) of $645,000.00. Ms. Carrasco stated that that was at the time of death. The Court stated that the inventory value is $743,000.00, that the real estate market is not stagnant, that it does not seem likely that the property is under water, that she will need to pay her filing fees, that the case was previously dismissed and that the court is reluctant to give her another opportunity. Ms. Carrasco stated that she waited for the probate referee to give their appraisal, the court dismissed the case, that she tried to bring the loan current and evicted the tenants who would not pay rent. The Court stated that she should have had representation, and that it will not appoint her without an attorney. Ms. Carrasco stated that she thought she was done, that the probate referee drove by the house, took a picture and then sent her a bill for $800.00, that the City want $80,000.00, that she has spoken to 3-4 attorneys but has not money and that she cannot touch the money, cannot sell the property and cannot refinance. The Court stated that the attorneys have offered to do this on the basis of money coming out of the estate and that there is equity in the estate. Ms. Carrasco stated that she has a right to represent herself, that the equity is tied up, that there is no cash money and that no attorney will help. The Court stated that if she wants to be appointed she must be represented by an attorney, that someone needs to open up administration and take the steps leading up to final distribution. Ms. Carrasco asked if she could appeal. The Court stated that it can deny the petition and she can take it up on appeal and asked if she wanted this denied or continued. Ms. Carrasco stated that she has filed everything the court needs and asked that it be continued. The petition for letters of administration was continued to November 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-28-2012 Vacated

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-28-2012 Vacated

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Continued To Jan-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter is on calendar for status on filing of an Inventory and Appraisal and an Order to Appear. There was no appearance by Nora Carrasco (Administrator in Propria Persona). The Court will issue a Notice of Intent to Terminate Estate for lack of an Inventory and Appraisal and lack of Estate assets. The matters were continued to January 22, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.

December 28, 2012: Upon further review, the Court found that an Order to Appear and Notice of Intention to Terminate Administration of the Estate on the Court's Own Motion had previously been issued on October 12, 2012. Therefore, the hearing date of January 22, 2013 is vacated, the Court hereby terminates administration of the Estate on the Court's own motion and Nora Carrasco's powers as Administrator are hereby suspended (pursuant to court order dated December 28, 2012).

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Continued To Jan-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Continued To Jan-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-11-2012 Continued To Dec-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Administrator Nora Carrasco is in Propria Persona. The Inventory and Appraisal has not been filed. At the last hearing the Administrator stated that she was attempting to save the property and re-negotiate the loan. A Creditor's Claim has been filed by the Department of Health Services in the amount of $82,532.00. The Court will send notice to Ms. Carrasco and the Department of Health Services of the Court's intent to terminate the probate proceeding for lack of assets. The Department of Health Services has the choice to come in as Administrator. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Nora Carrasco to appear on December 4, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the inventory has not been filed. Today's matters were also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-11-2012 Continued To Dec-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Continued To Sep-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Nora Carrrasco to appear on September 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why the Inventory and Appraisal has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Continued To Aug-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nora Carrasco in Propria Persona.

Ms. Carrasco explained the difficulties she was having with Tenants and the loan modification process. Status on the Inventory and Appraisal was continued to August 21, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar May-01-2012 Continued To May-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nora Carrasco in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that the revised documents appeared to be in order and granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (order for the same signed in open Court). The Court advised Ms. Carrasco as to what the next steps are/documents to be filed. A status hearing was set for May 1, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Continued To Nov-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nora Carrasco, Petitioner in Pro Per.

The Court advised Ms. Carrasco to contact the Bar Association of San Francisco and to get a lawyer to help her. Ms. Carrasco is to follow the Examiner's Notes to file a Supplemental Declaration, Proof of Publication and to submit a proposed order. The matter was continued to November 22, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.
